summary: Install/Uninstall button dead after an uninstall. Renderer-only (click never hits backend). Stale state.downloadJobs complete job -> re-rendered card wires pause/cancel not install (downloadState!==idle guard). Fix: normalize complete/cancelled to idle in renderList + clear job before re-render. NO image. Spun off MPI-100; same family as MPI-99 dead-uninstall + ac1c308 backend _depJobs fix.

MPI-99 author added context (review request honored). CONFIRMED the stale-complete-job root is identical to MPI-99 (proven by my MPI-99 probes: emit fires + el.show NEVER called on install-then-uninstall = wrong renderList branch, NOT a modal bug). KEY: a28c7a8 fixed ONLY the installed branch (~L251 isActiveDownload); the uninstalled branch (L362) is still !==idle = this bug. Fix = mirror the isActiveDownload whitelist to L362, preserve pause/cancel for a downloading not-yet-installed pack. Added research/mpi99-author-context.md (exact code+probes+regression checklist), corrected the card (MPI-99 fix = gate change a28c7a8 NOT MpiModal re-arm), linked project_download_complete_lingering_job. Replied to MPI-100 agent msg 1530ceba (reply a56b2702). NOT taking the card.

MPI-102 todo->done. Fixed dead Install button after uninstall: uninstalled-branch gate at renderList L362 changed from downloadState!==idle to the isActiveDownload whitelist (downloading/paused/installing), mirroring the installed-branch fix a28c7a8 (MPI-99). A lingering complete/cancelled job no longer hijacks the card into pause/cancel handlers; terminal jobs fall through to the Install (delete) handler. App-only, no image rebuild. Pause/cancel preserved for a genuinely-downloading not-yet-installed pack.
